nasb.text: having been built on the foundation of the apostles and prophets, Christ Jesus Himself being the corner stone,

esv.text: built on the foundation of the apostles and prophets, Christ Jesus himself being the cornerstone,

cnv.text: 並且建造在使徒和先知的根基上，基督耶穌自己就是奠基石，

ccb.text: 你们已被建立在众使徒和先知们的基础上，基督耶稣自己是房角石。

csbs.text: 并且被建造在使徒和先知的根基上，有基督耶稣自己为房角石。
